message:
Running command: grep -n "write_core_def\|core.def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/*.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -20
# Also check the build.py or main runner
find /nc/apps/padframe-gen -name "build.py" -o -name "cli.py" -o -name "__main__.py" 2>/dev/null | head -5

function.arguments: {"command": "grep -n \"write_core_def\\|core.def\" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/*.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v \".pyc\" | head -20\n# Also check the build.py or main runner\nfind /nc/apps/padframe-gen -name \"build.py\" -o -name \"cli.py\" -o -name \"__main__.py\" 2>/dev/null | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
grep -n "write_core_def\|core.def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/*.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -20
# Also check the build.py or main runner
find /nc/apps/padframe-gen -name "build.py" -o -name "cli.py" -o -name "__main__.py" 2>/dev/null | head -5
